subcodes.first_line: O thou who bearest My name, upon thee be My Glory! The letter from Jinab-i-'Ayn Ta hath attained the honor of being heard. From it wafted the fragrance of love and steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی نامه جناب ع‌ ط که بآنجناب ارسال نمود بشرف اصغا فائز عرف محبت و استقامت
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
